---
title: "Where to Dance in KW"
date-modified: today
language:
  title-block-modified: "Last Updated"
---
## Saturday April 11, 2026

### 👉 Revive 2

Location: @revivekaraoke @ [28 King St N.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/28Fm3Xm7TYjhg3hp8)

#### 9pm-2:30am

* [DJ Dallas Dee](https://www.instagram.com/djdallasdee/)
* [Jermz](https://www.instagram.com/jermz0800/)
* [DJ Jace](https://www.instagram.com/dj_jace_jrfit/)
* [CD Art](https://www.instagram.com/cdart.wav/)
* Benny Knox

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DWTyoGFkYaR/)


## Saturday April 18, 2026

### 👉 After Dark

Location: <Hungarian Canadian Club> @ [979 Kossuth Rd Cambridge](https://maps.app.goo.gl/EX7hcHjhsqnFBD3p7)

#### 9pm-2am

* [Mark Saunders](https://www.instagram.com/marksaundersmusic_official/)
* [Jermz](https://www.instagram.com/jermz0800/)
* [Geebs](https://www.instagram.com/sir_geebs/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DWhYgkWROjf/)


## Friday April 24, 2026

### 👉 Uptown Rinse 13

Location: @revivekaraoke @ [28 King St N.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/28Fm3Xm7TYjhg3hp8)

#### 9pm-2am

* [DJ Denim](https://www.instagram.com/cammatthewmusicandart/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DWkbkV8Dpli/)


## Saturday April 25, 2026

### 👉 Harm Reduction Vibe Production - Dance Party Sanguen Funraiser

Location: The Union @ [124 Sydney St. S. Kitchener](https://www.google.com/maps/place/124+Sydney+St+S,+Kitchener,+ON+N2G+3V2/)

#### 7pm-11pm

* [Kasia](https://www.instagram.com/koshkasia)
* [Half Eyes](https://www.instagram.com/jamesbrown.forestking)
* [Sylent Syd](https://www.instagram.com/sylentsyd/)

[Tickets](https://luma.com/7sevuph4)


---

> Know of a dance party that we should share? [DM us](https://www.instagram.com/fearisthevibekiller/) or [email us](mailto:getdown@fearisthevibekiller.com).
